metadata.reference: E. Shkondin, T. Repän, O. Takayama, A. V. Lavrinenko. High aspect ratio titanium nitride trench structures as plasmonic biosensor. Opt. Mater. Express 7, 4171-4182 (2017) (Numerical data kindly provided by Osamu Takayama)
metadata.comments: 105 nm thick titanium nitride (TiN) film on Si substrate annealed at 900 °C.
